top_picks.why_it_matters: This represents a meaningful shift in how leaders should think about AI investment for the quarter.
top_picks.enterprise_adaptation: Implementation pattern: Adopt the underlying approach via a sandboxed pilot with model-routing through an internal proxy. Caveats for regulated environments: enforce data residency by keeping all training and inference within approved cloud regions, route requests through a governed gateway with audit logging, and store secrets in the existing enterprise vault. 30-day experiment: stand up a small non-production deployment with synthetic data, measure latency and cost vs. the incumbent tool, and present findings to the AI council.
